_doc: Manual (non-plugin) install only. If you install specstep-session as a Claude Code plugin, the SessionEnd hook is wired automatically by hooks/hooks.json and you do NOT need this file. For a manual install, copy the two skills into .claude/skills/ and the reporter into .claude/hooks/, then merge this hooks block into your .claude/settings.json. The reporter also needs SPECSTEP_API_KEY (session_state.write scope) in the environment to record usage; absent it, it no-ops.
